caption:
Web dev insight: Why we use Next.js instead of WordPress.

WordPress powers 43% of the internet. That doesn't make it the right choice for 2026.

Here's the honest comparison:

WordPress:
- Plugin-dependent (each plugin = slower site)
- Security patches required constantly
- Themes sacrifice performance for features
- Average PageSpeed: 40–65

Next.js (what we use):
- Server-side + static rendering = ultra-fast
- No plugins, no attack surface
- Deployed on Vercel edge CDN
- Average PageSpeed: 92–99

If your site needs to rank on Google, convert mobile visitors, and stay secure — there's one clear choice.

→ bienzoli.com — we build the right way.

#NextJS #WordPress #WebDev #TechDecisions #MauritiusBusiness

templateData.headline: Why we chose Next.js over WordPress.
templateData.bodyText: WordPress powers 43% of the internet. That popularity comes at a cost: plugins, security patches, and performance that tops out at PageSpeed 65.
